'''mafasha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:featherman|featherman]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-f-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:featherman|featherman]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| mafasha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæfæshæth|mæfæshæth]] || [[word:mæfæshæj|mæfæshæj]] || [[word:mæfæshæsh|mæfæshæsh]] || [[word:mæfæshæ|mæfæshæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mafafashath|mafafashath]] || [[word:mafafashaj|mafafashaj]] || [[word:mafafashash|mafafashash]] || [[word:mafafasha|mafafasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mafashath|mafashath]] || [[word:mafashaj|mafashaj]] || [[word:mafashash|mafashash]] || [[word:mafasha|mafasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mafafshath|mafafshath]] || [[word:mafafshaj|mafafshaj]] || [[word:mafafshash|mafafshash]] || [[word:mafafshaf|mafafshaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mafashatha|mafashatha]] || [[word:mafashaja|mafashaja]] || [[word:mafashasha|mafashasha]] || [[word:mafashaka|mafashaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mafashath|mafashath]] || [[word:mafashaj|mafashaj]] || [[word:mafashash|mafashash]] || [[word:mafasha|mafasha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mafashathal|mafashathal]] || [[word:mafashajal|mafashajal]] || [[word:mafashashal|mafashashal]] || [[word:mafashakal|mafashakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mafashathatha|mafashathatha]] || [[word:mafashajaja|mafashajaja]] || [[word:mafashashasha|mafashashasha]] || [[word:mafashaka|mafashaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mafashathan|mafashathan]] || [[word:mafashajan|mafashajan]] || [[word:mafashashan|mafashashan]] || [[word:mafashakan|mafashakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mafashathaoro|mafashathaoro]] || [[word:mafashajaoro|mafashajaoro]] || [[word:mafashashaoro|mafashashaoro]] || [[word:mafashakaoro|mafashakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
